items.anchor: मेरे चाचा दिल्ली में काम करते हैं

items.anchor_en: My uncle works in Delhi
items.near_en: My uncle does a job in Delhi
items.far_en: My uncle works in Delhi
items.notes: chacha = father's younger brother; mama = mother's brother.

items.anchor: नाना जी बाज़ार से फल लाए

items.near_en: Grandfather fetched fruits from the market
items.far_en: Grandfather brought fruits from the market
items.notes: nana = maternal grandfather; dada = paternal grandfather.

items.anchor: दादी ने मुझे लोरी सुनाई

items.far: नानी ने मुझे लोरी सुनाई

items.far_en: Grandmother sang me a lullaby

items.anchor_en: My aunt had come to the wedding
items.near_en: My aunt had attended the wedding ceremony
items.far_en: My aunt had come to the wedding
items.notes: mausi = mother's sister; bua = father's sister.

items.anchor: फूफा जी हमें घूमाने ले गए

items.near_en: My uncle took us on a walk
items.far_en: My uncle took us for an outing

items.far_en: My aunt knitted a sweater for me

items.anchor: भतीजा मेरे घर पर रुका था

items.far_en: My niece went to school yesterday
